mapper.select: SELECT id, doc_id, kb_id, content, embedding, chunk_index, is_active, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM knowledge_chunk WHERE deleted = FALSE AND is_active = TRUE AND kb_id = #{kbId} AND embedding IS NOT NULL AND 1 - (embedding <=> CAST(#{queryEmbedding} AS vector)) >= #{threshold} ORDER BY embedding <=> CAST(#{queryEmbedding} AS vector) LIMIT #{topK}

SELECT id, doc_id, kb_id, content, embedding, chunk_index, is_active, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM knowledge_chunk WHERE deleted = FALSE AND is_active = TRUE AND embedding IS NOT NULL AND 1 - (embedding <=> CAST(#{queryEmbedding} AS vector)) >= #{threshold} ORDER BY embedding <=> CAST(#{queryEmbedding} AS vector) LIMIT #{topK}
